outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed - spot firmly in positive gamma territory above structural flip zone
outlook.summary: Spot (6584.5) trading significantly above visible option structure (6260-6440). Extremely bullish monthly metrics with PCR at 0.03 and reverse smirk skew indicating call dominance. Critical structural support at 5930 where Gamma Flip converges with Max Pain. RESONANCE detected at 6350 across all three expiries - rare multi-timeframe alignment. No visible resistance above current levels in provided data range.

levels.motivazione: Monthly Gamma Flip aligned with Max Pain at 5930. Critical structural support 10% below spot. Positive gamma regime above this level suppresses volatility and stabilizes prices.
RESONANCE: Same exact strike active across ALL THREE expiries (0DTE vol 318, WEEKLY vol 240, MONTHLY vol 174). Rare multi-timeframe harmonic confluence creating strong price attraction.
Highest monthly volume (985) with strong weekly participation (353). Key psychological round number below spot acting as pullback support zone.
Maximum 0DTE volume concentration (1534) with weekly confirmation (139). Short-term intraday price magnet for mean reversion plays.

market_regime.interpretation: Levels are less reliable. Gamma flip zone is a transition area. Expect larger swings and whipsaws. Use caution.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low to moderate; positive aggregate GEX suppresses volatility, though monthly negative GEX adds tail risk.
outlook.summary: Market is trapped between massive Call resistance at 24300 and strong Put support at 23300. High positive GEX in short-term expiries suggests pinning near Max Pain (23800).

levels.motivazione: Dominant Call Open Interest in all three expiries (0DTE, WEEKLY, MONTHLY) coinciding with Monthly Max Pain. Dealers are short calls, creating heavy resistance.
Significant Put Open Interest in both 0DTE and Weekly expiries acts as a structural floor. High put volume indicates defensive positioning.
0DTE Max Pain level. Spot is gravitating towards this level as dealers seek to minimize payout liabilities at today's close.
Largest Put OI in Monthly expiry. Provides structural support just below spot, limiting downside expansion in the long term.
Intraday sentiment pivot. Breach below this level shifts dealers to short gamma, potentially accelerating downward moves.
Highest Call OI in Weekly expiry. Acts as a secondary resistance cap above the 24300 Resonance level.
